title: athyrium micropterum
intro: Athyrium micropterum, also known as lady fern, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the fern family (Athyriaceae). Traditionally, the leaves of lady fern have been used in herbal medicine to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues, due to their anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties. The plant is rich in antioxidants and flavonoids, which may help to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and boost the immune system. Lady fern is often prepared as a tea or tincture, and it can also be used in herbal infusions and salves to harness its medicinal benefits.
